geographic_scope: Kargil, Dras, Batalik, and Kaksar sectors
theater_description: The 1999 high-altitude conflict in the Kargil-Dras-Batalik-Kaksar sectors along the Line of Control, ending with Indian recapture and cessation of hostilities on 26 July 1999.
geometry_method_note: The episode is bounded to the inhabited Kargil theater rather than the whole Kashmir dispute.
military_area_note: Indian troop deployment estimates are tied to the actual Kargil-Dras sector, not to the whole Indian armed forces.
civilian_area_note: Civilian exposure near Kargil and Dras is real, but the direct-death evidence in hand is not cleanly confined to the 1999 war window.
split_reason: Single bounded interstate war phase with strong military-source literature.
quality_note: Military deaths and troop deployment are strong. Civilian direct-death sourcing in the theater is too contaminated by multi-year shelling to support a publishable DR.
